name: nginx-multisite
description: Nginx web server with multiple SSL-enabled virtual hosts, security hardening, and custom configurations. Includes multi-site configuration, SSL certificate generation, and security features like fail2ban and ufw firewall.

name: cache
description: Caching services configuration including Memcached and Redis with authentication. Features Redis with password authentication and Memcached configuration.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Python FastAPI application deployment with PostgreSQL database backend. Includes Git-based deployment, Python virtual environment setup, PostgreSQL database configuration, and systemd service management.
